heading: Definitions
label: 460hhh Definitions
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–63, § 1107 Stat. 297Aug. 4, 1993“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘Spring Mountains National Recreation Area Act’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 103–63, § 1107 Stat. 297Aug. 4, 1993“This Act [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘Spring Mountains National Recreation Area Act’.”

children.heading: National Forest lands
children.label: 1 National Forest lands
children.text: The term “National Forest lands” means lands included in the National Forest System (as defined in ).section 1609(a) of this title

children.heading: Recreation Area
children.label: 2 Recreation Area
children.text: The term “Recreation Area” means the Spring Mountains National Recreation Area established by this subchapter.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.
